voice-first-coaching.name: Voice-First Financial Coaching
voice-first-coaching.details: Users speak a financial question ('Posso comprare un iPhone?') and receive a spoken, personalized recommendation grounded in their own uploaded financial data. The core differentiator: voice-in, voice-out with real numbers.

steps.name: Browser STT via Web Speech API
steps.details: useVoiceInput hook with feature detection + fallback to typed input (VOIC-02)

steps.name: ElevenLabs TTS backend
steps.details: POST /coaching/tts, per-persona voice IDs, 503 fallback to browser speechSynthesis

steps.name: Dual-channel response
steps.details: Voice-optimized message (no decimals, prose only) + details_a2ui structured panel

risks.name: STT browser variance
risks.details: Web Speech API not universally supported; Chrome-only for reliable demos

risks.name: ElevenLabs latency
risks.details: TTS generation adds 1-3s to response time; mitigated by speechSynthesis fallback

problems-solved.name: Low-friction financial education
problems-solved.details: 18-30 year olds won't read articles; voice interaction meets them where they are (accustomed to voice assistants)

grounded-financial-profile.name: Real-Data Financial Profile from Uploads
grounded-financial-profile.details: Users upload real bank statements (CSV/XLSX/PDF), payslips, receipts. The system extracts structured data, builds a canonical financial profile (income, expenses, margin, categories, patterns), and uses it to ground all coaching.

steps.name: Module registry with fingerprint matching
steps.details: 7 builtin modules (Fineco, Revolut, Satispay, PayPal, Edison, generic invoice, generic CSV) + adaptive LLM pipeline for unknown formats

steps.name: 3-tier OCR pipeline
steps.details: pytesseract → LLM text → LLM vision escalation

steps.name: Non-ledger enrichment
steps.details: Payslip/utility/receipt modules enrich profile with verified income, fixed expenses

risks.name: Extraction accuracy on Italian documents
risks.details: Italian bank formats vary wildly; adaptive pipeline catches unknowns but quality varies

problems-solved.name: Generic AI advice has zero trust
problems-solved.details: Without real numbers, coaching is generic tips. Grounding in actual €X income and €Y expenses creates credibility and personalization

transparent-reasoning.name: Transparent Reasoning with User Numbers
transparent-reasoning.details: Every coaching response shows explicit reasoning: which numbers were used, what tradeoffs exist, what assumptions were made. Never just 'yes/no' — always 'here's why, with YOUR data'.

steps.name: Structured response schema
steps.details: coaching_response.schema.json enforces reasoning_used array with minItems:1

problems-solved.name: AI trust deficit
problems-solved.details: Users won't follow financial advice from an AI they don't trust. Showing the math builds confidence.

learn-act-cards.name: Learn + Act Action Cards
learn-act-cards.details: Every coaching response can include educational resources (articles, videos, MARP slides) and actionable service cards (bank products, partner offers). Education → understanding → concrete action funnel.

steps.name: BM25 content search
steps.details: search_content tool call by LLM + fallback injection

problems-solved.name: Advice without action is useless
problems-solved.details: The funnel: AI educates → user understands → user acts via real bank/partner service. This is BTM's monetization path.

persona-mentor-system.name: Configurable Mentor Personas
persona-mentor-system.details: 4 selectable coaching personas (Mentore Saggio, Amico Sarcastico, Sergente Hartman, Cheerleader) with shared safety boundaries. Tone varies, financial correctness doesn't.

problems-solved.name: One-size-fits-all is boring
problems-solved.details: Different users respond to different communication styles. A stern drill sergeant motivates some; cheerful encouragement works for others.

safety-guardrails.name: 3-Layer Safety Pipeline
safety-guardrails.details: Input guard (prompt injection detection), persona boundary enforcement (system prompt), output scanner (hard-boundaries.yml regex groups). No investment-picking, no regulated advice, educational framing enforced.

problems-solved.name: Regulatory and reputational risk
problems-solved.details: A bank-associated AI giving bad financial advice = lawsuit. Safety pipeline prevents this.

italy-rules-knowledge-base.name: Italy Financial Rules Knowledge Base
italy-rules-knowledge-base.details: Static JSON with verified 2025 IRPEF brackets, INPS thresholds, bonus cultura, 730 deadlines, ISEE, TFR, regime forfettario. BM25-indexed. Coach can cite specific Italian rules.

problems-solved.name: Generic European advice is useless
problems-solved.details: Italian tax system is specific. IRPEF brackets, contributi INPS, cedolare secca — users need answers grounded in Italian law, not generic tips.

coach-tool-suite.name: 7-Tool LLM Coach Intelligence Suite
coach-tool-suite.details: Coach has 7 tools: search_content, search_italy_rules, get_user_profile, search_user_transactions, get_user_preferences, recall_past_insights, get_timeline_events. Lazy tool-first prompting replaces static profile blob.

problems-solved.name: Prompt bloat and irrelevant context
problems-solved.details: Static profile blob wasted tokens. Tool-first means coach fetches only what's needed per question.

financial-timeline.name: Financial Timeline with Life Event Detection
financial-timeline.details: Detects 6 life event types from transaction patterns: income shift, relocation, subscription accumulation, major purchase, debt change, extraordinary income. Visible in ProfileScreen Timeline tab. Injected into coach context.

problems-solved.name: Coach lacks temporal awareness
problems-solved.details: Without knowing the user recently changed jobs or moved, advice is out of context.

e2e-encrypted-messaging.name: E2E Encrypted User-to-User Messaging
e2e-encrypted-messaging.details: NaCl/libsodium X25519+Ed25519 asymmetric encryption. Pseudonymous $adjective-noun-NNNN usernames. Zero-knowledge server routing via recipient hashes. Admin !handle for signed official messages. BIP-39 recovery envelope.

problems-solved.name: No private communication channel
problems-solved.details: Users and admins need a way to communicate about sensitive financial matters without server-readable plaintext.

encryption-at-rest.name: Tiered Encryption at Rest + LLM No-Data-Retention
encryption-at-rest.details: T1 (E2E user-key) for raw content, T2 (server AES-GCM) for behavioral data, T3 (E2E) for identity fields. OpenAI no-store headers. OpenRouter ZDR. Per-user Strict Privacy Mode toggle.

problems-solved.name: DB breach exposes sensitive financial data
problems-solved.details: Bank statements, payslips, conversations stored in plaintext = catastrophic breach. Encryption limits blast radius.

quanto-mi-costa-davvero.name: "Quanto Mi Costa Davvero" (What It Really Costs Me)
quanto-mi-costa-davvero.details: Zero-onboarding single-purpose tool: say or type a purchase, AI shows real cost in hours worked, months of delayed savings, total BNPL interest. Instant impact, no bank data required.

steps.name: Single-page widget
steps.details: Input: purchase amount + optional hourly wage. Output: hours worked equivalent, BNPL total cost calculator, savings delay impact.

steps.name: Embeddable version
steps.details: BTM can embed on bancabtm.it as a lead-gen tool

problems-solved.name: BNPL obfuscation
problems-solved.details: BNPL grew 85% in 2 years in Italy. Users don't feel the real cost. This makes it viscerally tangible.

primo-stipendio-simulator.name: "Primo Stipendio" (First Paycheck) Simulator
primo-stipendio-simulator.details: Interactive simulator for students/new workers: input expected salary, AI explains gross vs net, IRPEF, INPS, TFR, and walks through setting up a budget. Workshop-ready tool for NEXT events.

steps.name: Salary input form
steps.details: RAL (gross annual), contract type, region → compute net monthly, IRPEF, INPS, TFR

steps.name: Budget walkthrough
steps.details: AI guides through 65-20-15 allocation with the user's actual net figure

steps.name: ElevenLabs narration
steps.details: Voice explains each deduction as the numbers appear

problems-solved.name: First-job shock
problems-solved.details: Young Italians see RAL in job offers but don't understand net. 'I was promised €24K but I only get €1,400/month?!' This makes it crystal clear.

contratto-decoder.name: "Contratto Decoder" (Contract Decoder)
contratto-decoder.details: Upload any financial document (loan contract, insurance, phone plan) and AI explains it in plain Italian, highlighting hidden costs, penalty clauses, and comparisons to alternatives.

problems-solved.name: Low financing diligence
problems-solved.details: BNPL users consistently fail to read ToS. This tool reads contracts FOR them and surfaces the traps.

subscription-audit-agent.name: Subscription Audit Agent
subscription-audit-agent.details: Upload CSV or connect bank data; AI identifies all recurring charges, classifies them (essential/nice-to-have/forgotten), calculates annual cost, generates cancellation plan with step-by-step scripts.

problems-solved.name: Subscription creep
problems-solved.details: Consumers underestimate monthly subscription spend by €100+. 63% of under-35s have 3+ video subscriptions.

financial-time-machine.name: Financial Time Machine
financial-time-machine.details: Show two futures: one with current behavior, one with specific changes. Visualize net worth at 30, 40, 50. Make compound interest tangible with the user's own numbers.

problems-solved.name: Compound interest incomprehension
problems-solved.details: Only 30% of Italian young adults understand compound interest. Seeing '€50/month → €15,000 in 15 years' makes it real.

bnpl-reality-lens.name: BNPL Reality Lens
bnpl-reality-lens.details: Paste checkout terms or describe a BNPL offer; AI computes total real cost including fees/interest, shows 'future you impact' in plain language, personalized to the user's monthly cash-flow slack.

problems-solved.name: BNPL psychological obfuscation
problems-solved.details: BNPL decouples 'pain of paying' from acquisition. This tool re-couples it by showing the actual total cost + opportunity cost.

gamified-savings-challenges.name: Gamified Savings Challenges (NEXT League)
gamified-savings-challenges.details: AI-generated weekly micro-challenges ('Skip delivery twice, move €20 to savings'). Progress tracked via voice check-ins. Leaderboards within NEXT community. ElevenLabs voice nudges.

problems-solved.name: Behavior change requires sustained engagement
problems-solved.details: One coaching session doesn't change habits. Weekly challenges with social accountability do.

impulse-vs-passion-classifier.name: Impulse vs Passion Purchase Classifier
impulse-vs-passion-classifier.details: AI surfaces behavioral history at purchase-decision moment: 'You've bought into 3 new hobbies in 6 months — 2 were abandoned within 4 weeks. Is this one different?' Self-reflection prompts before verdict.

problems-solved.name: Impulse vs genuine passion is invisible in the moment
problems-solved.details: Dopamine hit feels identical for impulse and real investment. Only behavioral history reveals the pattern.

crowdsourced-merchant-mapping.name: Crowdsourced Merchant Category Mapping
crowdsourced-merchant-mapping.details: Shared merchant→category knowledge base accumulated from LLM classifications and user corrections. 3-tier LLM escalation (sm→md→lg). Admin blacklist for adversarial entries. Compounding accuracy improvement.

problems-solved.name: Category accuracy degrades trust
problems-solved.details: Phase 3 rules missed too many transactions. Crowdsourced map + LLM escalation dramatically reduces 'uncategorized' rate.

content-platform-public.name: Public Content Platform (/learn)
content-platform-public.details: Articles, MARP presentations, videos browsable at /learn without authentication. Shareable URLs. BM25 search. Admin CRUD. SEO-friendly.

problems-solved.name: Educational content locked behind login
problems-solved.details: Content should be freely accessible to build trust and drive sign-ups.

peer-benchmark-anonymized.name: Anonymized Peer Spending Benchmark
peer-benchmark-anonymized.details: 'People your age in your area earn X on average, save Y, spend Z on categories A, B, C.' Uses aggregate anonymized data. Social context without judgment.

problems-solved.name: No reference point for 'normal'
problems-solved.details: Young adults have no idea if their spending is typical. 'Am I spending too much on food?' needs a benchmark.

fraud-scam-gym.name: Fraud & Scam Gym
fraud-scam-gym.details: AI generates personalized scam simulations (smishing, vishing, subscription traps, fake job offers) tuned to local patterns. Score-based training. Could run in NEXT workshops.

problems-solved.name: AI-enabled fraud targeting youth
problems-solved.details: EBA explicitly flags subscription traps and AI-enabled scams. Education must include recognition training.

micro-life-simulator.name: Micro-Simulator for Life Choices
micro-life-simulator.details: 'If I move out?' 'If I buy a car?' AI builds scenario model from real spending: best/base/worst probability bands. Makes uncertainty explicit, not just a single number.

problems-solved.name: Life decisions made blind
problems-solved.details: Moving out, buying a car — these are the biggest financial decisions for 18-30s. They currently decide by gut feeling.

chiedi-alla-banca.name: "Chiedi alla Banca" (Ask the Bank)
chiedi-alla-banca.details: AI front-end for BTM's actual product catalog. Natural-language queries about real bank offerings. Grounded in BTM's actual products, rates, and conditions.

problems-solved.name: Young adults don't understand bank products
problems-solved.details: What's a conto deposito? What savings account should I open? Natural language answers grounded in real offerings.

impulse-interceptor-72h.name: Impulse Interceptor (72-Hour AI Escrow)
impulse-interceptor-72h.details: When user wants to buy something impulsively, AI proposes a 72-hour cooldown contract with personalized alternatives (swap, rent, buy used, wait for paycheck). Tracks outcomes.

problems-solved.name: Impulse buying is the #1 budget killer
problems-solved.details: The 72-hour rule is proven but nobody enforces it. AI makes it a structured commitment with alternatives.

ai-explain-my-payslip.name: AI "Explain My Payslip"
ai-explain-my-payslip.details: Parse payslips; explain net vs gross, each tax line (IRPEF, INPS, addizionale regionale), overtime, TFR. Creates a 'salary upgrade' action plan (deductions, bonus applications).

problems-solved.name: Payslip incomprehension
problems-solved.details: Most young Italians can't read their own busta paga. They see the net number and ignore everything else.

auto-sinking-funds.name: Auto Sinking Funds Engine
auto-sinking-funds.details: AI identifies irregular annual/quarterly costs (insurance, car tax, holiday gifts, bollo auto) from transaction history and proposes a monthly micro-saving schedule to smooth them.

problems-solved.name: Irregular expenses destroy budgets
problems-solved.details: Car insurance, annual subscriptions, holiday gifts — these 'surprises' break monthly budgets every time.

ask-advisor-prep.name: AI-Assisted "Ask the Advisor" Prep
ask-advisor-prep.details: Before a branch appointment, AI generates a one-page briefing: user goals, constraints, key questions to ask, trade-offs to consider. Printable PDF. Amplifies BTM's relationship banking.

problems-solved.name: Young adults intimidated by bank meetings
problems-solved.details: They don't know what to ask. AI prep makes the meeting productive for both parties.

financial-literacy-duolingo.name: Financial Literacy Duolingo with Your Own Data
financial-literacy-duolingo.details: Short daily quizzes using the user's real spending: 'If your delivery spend stays at €X/month, what's the annual cost?' Personalized learning that sticks because it's about YOUR money.

problems-solved.name: Abstract financial education doesn't stick
problems-solved.details: Generic quiz: 'What is compound interest?' — boring. Personalized: 'Your €280/month delivery = €3,360/year. That's a vacation. True or false?' — memorable.

streaming-sse-responses.name: Token-by-Token SSE Streaming
streaming-sse-responses.details: Coach responses stream word-by-word via Server-Sent Events. Structured payloads (cards, verdict, A2UI) appear only when final. Graceful fallback to full-response if SSE breaks.

problems-solved.name: 5-15s LLM response feels like it's broken
problems-solved.details: Without streaming, the app looks frozen during LLM generation. Streaming gives immediate feedback.

pwa-standalone.name: PWA Standalone App (vite-plugin-pwa)
pwa-standalone.details: Progressive Web App with standalone display mode, service worker, offline shell caching, proper icons, installable on mobile home screens.

problems-solved.name: Web app feels like a website, not an app
problems-solved.details: PWA standalone removes browser chrome. Feels native on mobile.

mobile-first-ui.name: Mobile-First UI Overhaul
mobile-first-ui.details: visualViewport keyboard handling, tables→cards on mobile, pull-to-refresh, 44px tap targets, profile tab grid, safe-area insets. Designed for 390px screens first.

problems-solved.name: App unusable on mobile
problems-solved.details: Tables overflow, keyboard covers input, tabs don't fit — target audience uses phones exclusively.

about-page-transparency.name: Public About Page + Privacy Transparency
about-page-transparency.details: Public /about explaining how it works, what data is stored, how AI is used, legal disclaimers. Written for 20-year-olds. No provider names. Strict Privacy Mode toggle in Settings.

problems-solved.name: Users don't trust AI with their financial data
problems-solved.details: Radical transparency about what happens to their data builds trust. Judges want to see this.

community-podcast-generator.name: AI Community Financial Literacy Podcast
community-podcast-generator.details: AI takes a financial topic + NEXT community questions and generates a short audio episode with ElevenLabs voices. Weekly, distributed via BTM channels.

problems-solved.name: Content creation is expensive for a small bank
problems-solved.details: AI-generated audio content at near-zero marginal cost. NEXT community provides the questions.

emotional-spending-detector.name: Emotional Spending Detector
emotional-spending-detector.details: Uses time + merchant patterns to flag likely emotional spending (late-night purchases, post-payday sprees). Offers alternative actions (walk, delayed checkout). Tracks outcomes.

problems-solved.name: Emotional spending is invisible
problems-solved.details: Users don't recognize their own patterns. 'You buy from Amazon at 11pm on Fridays' is a powerful mirror.

e2e-test-suite.name: Real Stack E2E Test Suite
e2e-test-suite.details: Playwright tests against real Docker Compose stack (no mocks). LLM stub server. Full user journey, tool call verification, error paths, mobile viewport. 22 tests across chromium + mobile.

problems-solved.name: Demo reliability
problems-solved.details: Zero integration tests = demo could fail from any untested seam. Real E2E catches what unit tests miss.

user-goals-and-preferences.name: User Goals, Dos & Don'ts Preferences
user-goals-and-preferences.details: Users can set financial goals ('save for emergency fund'), dos ('always check price per kg'), and don'ts ('never buy BNPL'). Coach references these across sessions.

problems-solved.name: Coach forgets your priorities
problems-solved.details: Without stored preferences, every session starts from zero context about what the user cares about.

marp-real-rendering.name: MARP Real Slide Rendering
marp-real-rendering.details: @marp-team/marp-core replaces marked. Proper theme (senso), CSS var dark mode, fullscreen portal, 16:9 aspect ratio. Educational slides look professional.

problems-solved.name: Educational slides looked broken
problems-solved.details: marked-based renderer didn't handle MARP directives. Slides looked like plain HTML instead of proper presentations.

tos-moderation-system.name: TOS Moderation with Progressive Enforcement
tos-moderation-system.details: LLM-based TOS check on user-submitted text (timeline context, merchant names). Progressive penalty: warning → 24h timeout → 7d → ban. Appeals via notifications. Admin moderation queue.

problems-solved.name: User-submitted content can be abusive
problems-solved.details: Free-text inputs need moderation. Progressive enforcement is fair while preventing abuse.

accessibility-hooks.name: Accessibility: Reduced Motion, High Contrast, Offline Detection
accessibility-hooks.details: 6 hooks (useMediaQuery, useReducedMotion, useHighContrast, useOnlineStatus, useHapticFeedback, useLocaleFormat). CSS reduced-motion and high-contrast overrides. OfflineBanner. BalanceMask.

problems-solved.name: Accessibility is table stakes
problems-solved.details: prefers-reduced-motion, high contrast, offline indicators — these are expected in any modern app.

local-deals-budget-alignment.name: Local Deals + Budget Alignment
local-deals-budget-alignment.details: Partner with local merchants to recommend budget-compatible alternatives (affordable gym, local events) instead of expensive options. Ties into BTM's territorial mission.

problems-solved.name: Generic advice vs local context
problems-solved.details: BTM's strength is territorial presence. Recommending the local gym instead of a franchise subscription leverages this.

next-advisory-board-tool.name: NEXT Advisory Board Decision Support Tool
next-advisory-board-tool.details: Internal AI tool for BTM's young Advisory Board to evaluate project proposals. AI scores feasibility, cost, community impact, and alignment with BTM's mission.

problems-solved.name: Evidence-based youth governance
problems-solved.details: The Advisory Board needs data, not vibes. AI helps evaluate proposals with structured criteria.

ai-financial-diary.name: AI Financial Diary (Voice Check-in)
ai-financial-diary.details: Daily 30-second voice check-in: 'What did you spend today?' AI builds spending profile over time without bank integration. Privacy-first, low-friction.

problems-solved.name: Not everyone wants to upload bank data
problems-solved.details: Privacy-first alternative: build spending awareness through daily voice journaling, no bank connection required.

tabaccaio-digitale.name: "Il Tabaccaio Digitale" (WhatsApp/Telegram Bot)
tabaccaio-digitale.details: A WhatsApp/Telegram bot in local dialect that answers financial questions the way a trusted older neighbor would. Zero app install. Maximum accessibility.

problems-solved.name: Not everyone downloads apps
problems-solved.details: WhatsApp is already on every Italian phone. Meeting users where they are = maximum reach.
